message:
feat(robot): add mission state/decision types to robot_types (ft-1i2ge.5.2)

Add typed structs for ft robot mission state and decisions endpoints:
MissionRunState, MissionAgentState, MissionActionState enums,
MissionStateFilters, MissionAssignmentCounters, MissionTransitionInfo,
MissionAssignmentData, MissionStateData, MissionFailureCatalogEntry,
MissionDecisionData, MissionDecisionsData structs. Add
RobotResponse::success() constructor. 14 unit tests + 16 proptests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
